---
title : "1,500 Scientists Lift the Lid on Reproducibility :"
date : "2016-01-01"
author : ["Monya Baker"]
categories : ["Presentation"]
publication : "Nature News & Comment"
publication_short : "Nature News & Comment"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Monya Baker (2016). *1,500 Scientists Lift the Lid on Reproducibility :*. Nature News & Comment

:::
